item.title: Remember
item.description: The person that should have been honored. Melissa Anne Hortman was an American politician and lawyer who served as the 61st speaker of the Minnesota House of Representatives from 2019 to 2025.  Assassinated: June 14, 2025, Brooklyn Park, MN

item.description: Glad I don't have to use one of those as this would definitely happen to me.
item.dc:creator: WazertFromBlueSky

item.title: My beautiful friend has left this ugly world.
item.description:
That's her on the left. Call her Bee. Here she had recently moved to Knoxville TN, and I was visiting for Thanksgiving.
She was a chef, opening a new restaurant.
We went to see The Menu on Thanksgiving Day.
Went for a hike
Spaceport bar was a trip
Potential second location. (It never happened.)
Blast from the past, lol.
Poor worn out little Mudbug.
We met in Las Vegas for a week. Neither of us gamble.
The bartender said we were supposed to take pictures of the drink, not each other.
She was an expert at Korean BBQ
We did Omega Mart / Meow Wolf
And played f*cking DUNGEONS & DRAGONS.
She can't believe I talked her into it
Yes, the one game I played in Vegas was D&D.
Dinner at Wing Lei
We saw Penn & Teller. No pictures during the show, but she got called on stage for Teller's fishbowl routine!
I don't remember which sky attraction this was
She'd moved to Pittsburgh PA and I flew over to drag her to the eclipse
I kept taking guerilla pictures of her in my glasses
Tired Bug
Long day
Driving to Ohio for the eclipse, worried because it was a little cloudy
We got out from under clouds, literally navigating with the weather app
Found a neat little park
It was an amazing experience
Bus around Pittsburgh
She was showing me stairs.
Probably watching Star Trek
AI slop, but it's too cute
Last day of summer 2025. Cheers, Bee.
I’ll miss you forever.
item.dc:creator: tanjredshirt

item.title: Have some mates who didn't know they couldn't park there
item.description:
If only here were signs or something.
How did you even park there, mate?
Coventry motor festival
Tu peux pas te garer là, mec.
Sophia Floersch’s Crash at Macau
Good thing someone parked there, mate.
shouldn't have parked there mate.
Do you have time to talk about our lord and savior, mate?
That sounded expensive, mate.
Kann hier nicht parken, Kumpel
context: mate parked on a spot reserved for loading and unloading.
Hier mag je niet parkeren vent.

item.dc:creator: vladrichdemaclant

item.title: What we know
item.description:
Setting the Record Straight: No Proof of Any “Trans Relationship” in the Charlie Kirk Case Some outlets like Fox News and the New York Post rushed out a storyline claiming Tyler Robinson — the suspect in Kirk’s death — had a “trans partner.” That narrative doesn’t hold up. What the facts actually show: • Robinson shared a 3-bedroom apartment with a few roommates. • One roommate, who went by “Lance,” spoke to reporters and claimed to have Discord chats with Robinson. Discord later confirmed those messages were fake. • There’s zero evidence that Lance is trans — the label came from assumptions based on screen names and appearance, not from anything official. • Nothing confirms Robinson was in a romantic relationship with any of his roommates. Social profiles show no links tying them together that way. This is a perfect case study of how misinformation spreads when people want to push a culture war angle. The same voices that scream about “fake news” are the ones running half-baked stories with no verification. Bottom line: There’s no confirmed evidence Robinson had a trans partner or any kind of relationship like that. Until real proof surfaces, those claims are nothing more than political spin.
Where are the files
item.dc:creator: SquaresNews

item.title: John Oliver: "F*ck! Sh*t! F*cking Sh*t! F*cking Sh*t! F*ck It!!!It Was Fun While It Lasted Guys"
item.description: John Oliver says he's lucky Warner Bros. Discovery doesn't have to worry about the same things (Trump & FCC) – as CBS (parent company Paramount Skydance), or ABC (parent company Disney), since they're on Cable – Then finds out the MAGA Billionaire Ellisons are planning to swallow them too. #awesome #funny #comedy #current_affairs #mildly_interesting

item.title: You know what they say about rose tinted glasses.
item.dc:creator: MayMyEnemiesLiveLong

item.title: Return of the Meme: 1482 (ugly bread)
item.description:
Let's get this bread. (It's me, i'm the ugly bread that isn't pretty.)
It is a cool, rainy morning here in the Verde today. I'm at my computer filling out more job applications for jobs i hopefully wouldn't fall asleep yet, hoping for sleep study cancelations so I can actually get mine done.
Dreamed I was on the Boston T going to a conference dressed as a Scythian, someone broke my spear and I was pissed about it.
I would so be down for this
I always love a good meme about a Shrike.
Heyyyyyy there.
Last time I walked into one, it was for a bathroom break on a long car drive, and I accidentally bought three books that I still have not read yet.
I learned to my awe and terror in an accidental wiki walk two days ago that FUNGAL prion diseases exist.
If I could fly a flag, it would either be a Kingdom of Gondor, Federation, or an image of Pippin.
It's because I am very careful with my content.
I meant to hit the update button like three hours ago, but then The ADHD compelled me to fill out another job application and make a meme about House Sparrows sooooooo. Yeah. Sorry about that.
Thinking about the sea a lot. I want to visit the Sea someday again when I can afford it.
I do, anyway
Raven Kats'ina, I think. According to Hopi folklore, it was the Ravens who first brought news of the Kats'inas. I say Kats'ina specifically because Hopi has no "ch" sound.
Pippin tax! Today's message from Pippin: [kissing noises] "No." ______ 1) Are you on the run to a safe place and passing through Arizona on your way to safer grounds? My apartment is open to you to crash at, and it is a safe space. Pippin and I will make you a meal and gladly share tea, wine, or mead with you. 2) Hey! Take your meds with a full glass of water, please. Do it for Pippin, or Space Mom, or better yet, do it for yourself. 3) Ĝefeloað wē. We will carry on. 4) all funds from the sales of items at these two links will be sent to support charities aiding to fight for Trans rights in the US (not just T-shirts!) https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74812801-all-conures-are-anarchists https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74811778-whiptail-pride 5) Since multiple people have requested this over the last two weeks or so, my ko-fi is: https://ko-fi.com/codyandpippin
item.dc:creator: CodyBurkett

item.title: Intense
item.dc:creator: ginalynn8942

item.title: GovBrief Today #234
item.description: ? Every move is a loyalty test now. At a memorial meant for mourning, the president told tens of thousands that he “hates his opponents” and wants no good for them. Science, journalism, and national honors are bent into tests of allegiance. Tylenol is politicized, reporters are silenced, and medals are handed out like party favors. Resistance is punished. That should terrify every American. Let’s empower those who refuse to bend in our communities. That means showing up when they are targeted, defending them out loud, and refusing to be silent. Do not leave truth to the algorithm. Our free and private nightly email arms you with images, data, and quotes so you can see it all for yourself. Add your email at govbrief dot today or on Substack at Gov Brief Today. #GovBriefToday #Resist Subscribe (It's Free!) - https://gbounacos.substack.com [1] https://go.govbrief.today/pregnancy-autism-report-tylenol [2] https://go.govbrief.today/pentagon-press-access-tightens [3] https://go.govbrief.today/charlie-kirk-memorial-service [4] https://go.govbrief.today/ben-carson-medal-freedom [5] https://go.govbrief.today/tiktok-murdoch-dell-investment [6] https://go.govbrief.today/paul-fcc-chair-dispute
item.dc:creator: GeorgeBounacos
